name: Mushroom-Sauced Roast Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 beef eye of round roast, 2-3 pounds
4 green onions, bias-sliced into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from meat.
2. Mix mustard and pepper.
3. Rub the mixture onto the meat.
4. Place the meat on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
5. Insert a meat thermometer.
6. Roast in an oven set to 325 degrees until the thermometer reads 140°F for medium rare (1 1/2 to 2 hours) or 155°F for medium (1 3/4 to 2 1/4 hours).
7. Cover with foil and let stand 15 minutes before carving.
8. Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan, cook mushrooms, green onions, and garlic in hot butter until the green onions are tender.
9. Stir in flour and thyme.
10. Gradually stir in beef broth.
11. Cook over medium heat until thickened and bubbly.
12. Continue cooking for 1 minute more.
13. Stir in light cream or milk, then cook until heated through.
14. Thinly slice the meat across the grain.
15. Arrange on a serving platter.
16. Pour some sauce atop the meat.
17. Pass remaining sauce.
18. Serve with mashed potatoes.
